<tt src={/class-icons/common/physical-training.png} tip={Physical Training}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/gram-mastery.png} tip={Gram Mastery}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/radiant-pulse.png} tip={Radiant Pulse}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/enhanced-spear-of-lugh-i.png} tip={Enhanced Spear of Lugh I}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/call-to-sentinel.png} tip={Call to Sentinel}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/gram-accelerator.png} tip={Gram Accelerator}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/fury-of-roan.png} tip={Fury of Roan}>

<tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/order-to-sentinel-i.png} tip={Order to Sentinel I}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/radiant-shock.png} tip={Radiant Shock}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/radiant-control.png} tip={Radiant Control}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/light-enchant.png} tip={Light Enchant}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/radiant-will.png} tip={Radiant Will}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/enhanced-spear-of-lugh-ii.png} tip={Enhanced Spear of Lugh II}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/charge-of-fionn.png} tip={Charge of Fionn}>

<tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/radiant-dawn.png} tip={Radiant Dawn}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/order-to-sentinel-ii.png} tip={Order to Sentinel II}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/helian-blessing.png} tip={Helian Blessing}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/enhanced-spear-of-lugh-iii.png} tip={Enhanced Spear of Lugh III}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/gram-expert.png} tip={Gram Expert}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/common/maple-warrior.png} tip={Maple Warrior}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/spear-of-light.png} tip={Spear of Light}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/sting-of-roan.png} tip={Sting of Roan}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/enhanced-fury-of-roan-i.png} tip={Enhanced Fury of Roan I}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/path-of-fionn.png} tip={Path of Fionn}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/shield-of-chulainn.png} tip={Shield of Chulainn}> -> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/will-of-light.png} tip={Will of Light}>
details: All 1st to 4th Job skills can be maxed
Put one SP into each skill first and then max each skill in this order
For any skills that have prerequisites, follow them first before following build path

primary.name: Return to Helia
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30\nCooldown: 600 sec.
primary.desc: When used, teleports to Helia, Erel's hometown
details: This skill is gained by completing the Erel storyline

primary.name: Stellar Equalize
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Duration: 2400 sec, Attack Power & Magic ATT: +4%\nCooldown: 300 sec.
details: This skill is gained by completing the Erel storyline

primary.name: Spear of Lugh
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 18, Max Enemies Hit: 4, Damage: 110%, Number of Attacks: 2

primary.name: Radiant Leap
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 5, jumps further. Can be used 2 times consecutively.
details: Can be assigned a Key Slot or activated by pressing jump twice<bp_While in the air, pressing together with the Up Arrow Key will perform a vertical jump_>
Horizontal jump can be used twice in a row

primary.name: Radiant Set
primary.shortDesc: Speed: +20, Jump: +20, Max Speed: +20, Attack Speed +2

primary.name: Radiant Vision
primary.shortDesc: Damage: +10%, Critical Damage: +10%, Final Damage: +20%

primary.name: Radiant Hold
primary.shortDesc: Max HP: +10%, Defense: +200, Knockback Resistance: +40%, Damage Taken: -20%

primary.name: Fury of Roan
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 22, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 250%, Number of Attacks: 4\nCooldown: 10 sec\n[Shining Sentinel]: Attacks up to 3 enemies 4 times, dealing 150% damage for 10 sec
primary.desc: Sweep forward and summon a [Shining Sentinel]
details: [Shining Sentinel]: Targets and attacks nearby enemies and disappears upon attacking<bp_Prioritizes bosses with the highest HP first_>
[Combo]: Can be used while casting <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/spear-of-lugh.png} tip={Spear of Lugh (1st Job)}>

primary.name: Enhanced Spear of Lugh I
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 24, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 188%, Number of Attacks: 4
details: Increases Max Enemies Hit, %Damage, and Number of Attacks

primary.name: Call to Sentinel
primary.shortDesc: [Passive Effect: Shining Sentinel Damage +160% points]
primary.desc: Increases %Damage of [Shining Sentinel] by a flat amount that are summoned from <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/fury-of-roan.png} tip={Fury of Roan (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/sting-of-roan.png} tip={Sting of Roan (4th Job)}>

primary.name: Radiant Pulse
primary.shortDesc: Abnormal Status Resistance: +40, Elemental Resistance: +40%, Final Damage: +20%

primary.name: Physical Training
primary.shortDesc: Permanently increases STR by 30 and DEX by 30.

primary.name: Gram Mastery
primary.shortDesc: Gram Mastery: +50%, Attack Power: +20, Final Damage: +10%

primary.name: Gram Accelerator
primary.shortDesc: Attack Speed: +2, STR: +40

primary.name: Light Enchant
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 10, Duration: 200 sec, Attack Power: +20, Critical Rate: +10%, Damage: +20%

primary.name: Charge of Fionn
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 45, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 420%, Number of Attacks: 2
primary.desc: Dash forward while pushing back enemies
details: While dashing, you will not be knocked back at all (Super Knockback Resistance)

primary.name: Enhanced Spear of Lugh II
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 285%, Number of Attacks: 6

primary.name: Order to Sentinel I
primary.shortDesc: [Passive Effect: Shining Sentinel Damage +180% points]
primary.desc: Increases %Damage of [Shining Sentinel] by a flat amount that are summoned from <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/fury-of-roan.png} tip={Fury of Roan (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/sting-of-roan.png} tip={Sting of Roan (4th Job)}>

primary.name: Radiant Control
primary.shortDesc: Boss Damage: +20%, Ignore Defense: +40%, Final Damage: +15%

primary.name: Radiant Shock
primary.shortDesc: Critical Rate: +20%, Attack Power: +20, Final Damage: +20%

primary.name: Radiant Will
primary.shortDesc: Max HP: +20%, Damage Taken: -20%, Knockback Resistance: +60%

primary.name: Enhanced Spear of Lugh II
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 36, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 462%, Number of Attacks: 6

primary.name: Sting of Roan
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 556%, Number of Attacks: 6\nCooldown: 10 sec\n[Shining Sentinel]: Attacks up to 3 enemies 4 times, dealing 150% damage for 10 sec
primary.desc: Strike forward and summon a [Shining Sentinel]
details: [Shining Sentinel]: Targets and attacks nearby enemies and disappears upon attacking<bp_Prioritizes bosses with the highest HP first_>
[Combo]: Can be used while casting <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/spear-of-lugh.png} tip={Spear of Lugh (1st Job)}>

primary.name: Enhanced Fury of Roan I
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 556%, Number of Attacks: 6\nCooldown: 10 sec\n[Shining Sentinel]: Attacks up to 3 enemies 6 times, dealing 30% damage for 10 sec
details: Increases Number of Attacks of [Shining Sentinel]<bp_Ingame tooltip lists %Damage as 30%, may be error - will fix in future if needed_>

primary.name: Order to Sentinel II
primary.shortDesc: [Passive Effect: Shining Sentinel Damage +200% points]
primary.desc: Increases %Damage of [Shining Sentinel] by a flat amount that are summoned from <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/fury-of-roan.png} tip={Fury of Roan (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/sting-of-roan.png} tip={Sting of Roan (4th Job)}>

primary.name: Radiant Dawn
primary.shortDesc: Attack Power: +40, Critical Rate: +20%, Final Damage: +20%

primary.name: Gram Expert
primary.shortDesc: Gram Mastery: +70%, Attack Power: +40, Final Damage: +20%, Critical Damage: +6%
details: Now grants flat Attack and increases %Final Damage and %Crit Damage

primary.name: Path of Fionn
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 300, Max Enemies Hit: 12, Charge Damage: 520%, Number of Attacks: 6, Ignore Defense: +100%\nAttacks up to 5 times in the direction of your choice\nCan be used 2-5 times, with a 60 sec cooldown beginning after the first hit.
primary.desc: Dash towards a chosen direction while damaging enemies in your path
details: Pressing the desired Arrow Keys along with the Skill Key will dash towards that direction, including diagonal directions
Can be used up to 5 times and the cooldown starts after the initial cast

primary.name: Helian Blessing
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40, Duration: 200 sec, Damage: 10%, Attack Power: +30

primary.name: Shield of Chulainn
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 80, Invincibility Duration: 3 sec\nCooldown 120 sec\n[Passive Effect: Comboing Roan skills creates a barrier that blocks an amount of damage up to 10% of your Max HP]
details: [Passive]: Grants a %Max HP barrier when <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/fury-of-roan.png} tip={Fury of Roan (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/sting-of-roan.png} tip={Sting of Roan (4th Job)}> is used together during <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/spear-of-lugh.png} tip={Spear of Lugh (1st Job)}>

Unaffected by cooldown resets, %Buff Duration, and <tt src={/class-icons/explorers/paladin/combat-orders.png} tip={Temporarily increases all of your skill levels. Only 4th Job Skills can be increased beyond master level while other skills can only be increased to master level. Exceptions: Some special skills, beginner skills, Combat Orders, hyper skills, 5th job skills, and 6th job skills cannot be increased.}/> Combat Orders

primary.name: Maple Warrior
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 70, Goddess of Maple World appears\n[Passive Effect: All stats with a direct AP investment increase by 15%]
details: Skill is a passive, the active effect does nothing except displays an animation

primary.name: Spear of Light
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 40, Gram Summon Duration: 60 sec\nMax Enemies Hit: 6, Damage: 400%, Number of Attacks: 4
primary.desc: Place down a gram that periodically attacks enemies within the zone

primary.name: Will of Light
primary.shortDesc: MP Cost: 30, Cooldown: 300 sec
primary.desc: Removes certain abnormal status effects and become immune to Abnormal Status for 3 secs
details: Unaffected by <tt src={/class-icons/explorers/paladin/combat-orders.png} tip={Temporarily increases all of your skill levels. Only 4th Job Skills can be increased beyond master level while other skills can only be increased to master level. Exceptions: Some special skills, beginner skills, Combat Orders, hyper skills, 5th job skills, and 6th job skills cannot be increased.}/> Combat Orders

hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100, Duration: 30 sec, Damage: +10%.\nCooldown: 60 sec

hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 300, Damage: 480%, Number of attacks: 10, Max Enemies Hit: 10, Number of Chase Cuts: 10\nCooldown: 60 sec
hyperActive.desc: Unleash a rain of grams from above

hyperActive.name: Hundred Pole
hyperActive.shortDesc: MP Cost: 100, Duration: 30 sec, Critical Damage: +10%\nCooldown: 60 sec

fifthMain.name: Eternal Light
fifthMain.shortDesc: Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 600%, Number of Attacks: 5\nCooldown: 10 sec\n[Radiant Sentinel]: Attacks up to 8 enemies 6 times, dealing 250% damage for 10 sec
fifthMain.desc: Periodically empowers <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/spear-of-lugh.png} tip={Spear of Lugh (1st Job)}> to deal an additional attack and summons a [Radiant Sentinel]
details: [Shining Sentinel]: Targets and attacks nearby enemies and disappears upon attacking<bp_Prioritizes bosses with the highest HP first_>

fifthMain.name: Sentinel Rise
fifthMain.shortDesc: [Shining Sentinel]: Max Enemies Hit: 8, Damage: 940%, Number of Attacks: 12, Duration: 20 sec\nCooldown: 60 sec
fifthMain.desc: Summon several [Shining Sentinels] that attack nearby enemies

fifthMain.name: Eternal Guardian
fifthMain.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 32
Sentinel Captain Summon Duration: 30 sec, Grants the Roan Joint Attack Effect
Guardian's Gaze designates up to 3 enemies for 30 sec
Cooldown: 120 sec
[Roan Joint Attack]: While active, whenever you cast Fury of Roan, Sting of Roan, or Destruction of Roan, the Sentinel Captain will cast them at the same time.
[Captain's Fury of Roan]: Attacks up to 8 enemies 13 times, dealing 556% damage
[Captain's Sting of Roan]: Attacks up to 8 enemies 13 times, dealing 556% damage
[Captain's Destruction of Roan]: Can hold the key for 1.8 sec
Continuously attacks up to 15 enemies 8 times, dealing 1880% damage
[Guardian's Gaze]: Landing a Roan attack skill 310 times activates Judgement of Light
[Judgement of Light]: Attacks enemies designated by Guardian's Gaze 15 times, dealing 2200% damage, then sweeps the area 16 times with consecutive waves of light that deal additional attacks.
fifthMain.desc: Summon the [Sentinel Captain] that also casts the same attack when using <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/fury-of-roan.png} tip={Fury of Roan (2nd Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/sting-of-roan.png} tip={Sting of Roan (4th Job)}> <tt src={/class-icons/shine/erel-light/destruction-of-roan.png} tip={Destruction of Roan (5th Job)}>
details: While summoned, select enemies are marked with [Guardian's Gaze] which activates the [Judgment of Light] attack on marked enemies upon activating [Roan] attacks a set number of times<bp_Prioritizes bosses with the highest Max HP first_>

fifthMain.name: Destruction of Roan
fifthMain.shortDesc:
MP Cost: 450, Max Key-down Duration: 1.8 sec
Max Enemies Hit: 15, Damage: 1880%, Number of Attacks: 8
Damage taken while the skill key is held, including attacks that deal damage in proportion to Max HP: -40%
Cooldown: 120 sec
fifthMain.desc: While held, emit a shining light that damages enemies in a wide range
details: While held, reduces damage taken including %Max HP attacks, you will not be knocked back at all (Super Knockback Resistance), and prevents Critical Abnormal Statuses
